name: VS Code
description: Visual Studio Code is a free, cross-platform source code editor developed by Microsoft with debugging, Git integration, and an extensions ecosystem.

years.notes: Blue chevron refresh shipped in 1.17 (October 2017) — see https://code.visualstudio.com/blogs/2017/10/24/theicon. The 2015 preview (blue infinity borrowed from Visual Studio Monaco) and the April 2016 1.0 chevron lack a publishable SVG source, so they are omitted; <defs> placed before consuming group to keep the url(#g) gradient reference resolvable in strict sanitizers.
